TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_abu, title = abu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/abu} }

S.FORM: == satangahan : == abu u zuma a kamu : nu Hulam :ÁĀįÁáľ nu Amilika :ash nu Zipun :ÁĀį u canan ku abu(abuśėĮšĽÄťļľ?)ňź sapihica ku abu(abuŚĀöšĽÄťļľ?)ňź namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ňź == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ňź ==
S.PHON: == sataŇčańßan : == abu u zuma a kamu : nu ńßur~…ĺam :** nu amir~…ĺika :asńß nu zipun :* u ¶anan ku abu(abu***?)* sapińßi ¶a ku abu(abu***?)* namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan * == mar~…ĺaar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan * ==
S.FORM: == satangahan : == abu u zuma a kamu : nu Hulam :ÁĀįÁáľ nu Amilika :ash nu Zipun :ÁĀį u canan ku abu(abuśėĮšĽÄťļľ?)ňź sapihica ku abu(abuŚĀöšĽÄťļľ?)ňź namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ňź == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ňź ==
S.PHON: == sataŇčańßan : == abu u zuma a kamu : nu ńßur~…ĺam :** nu amir~…ĺika :asńß nu zipun :* u ¶anan ku abu(abu***?)* sapińßi ¶a ku abu(abu***?)* namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan * == mar~…ĺaar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan * ==
